blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Configured no-data and error handling
- Selected a contact point for notifications
- Added a summary annotation
- Saved and activated your alert rule
You now have a working alert rule that actively monitors your data and notifies the right people when issues arise. This is the foundation of proactive operations.

---

### More to explore (optional)

Read more about how you can:

- [Configure contact points](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/configure-notifications/manage-contact-points/)
- [Write effective alert annotations](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/alert-rules/annotation-label/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following path next:

- [Create a silence](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-create-silence/)
